revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[日本]]で起きた[[放火]][[事件]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:日本の事件|ほうかしけん]]'

revision.comment: [[Category:日本の事件]]を除去; [[Category:日本の犯罪]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
revision.text:

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:日本の放火事件]] [[ar:Category:إحراق الممتلكات في اليابان]] [[az:Category:Yaponiyada qəsdən yandırma]] [[commons:Category:Arsons in Japan]] [[fa:Category:آتش‌سوزی‌ها در ژاپن]] [[ko:Category:일본의 방화 사건]] [[pt:Category:Incêndios criminosos no Japão]] [[th:Category:การลอบวางเพลิงในประเทศญี่ปุ่น]] [[vi:Category:Phóng hỏa ở Nhật Bản]] [[zh:Category:日本縱火案]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kazahinomi-no-Miya Arson Incident]].

revision.comment: Bot: jawiki-title redirect to EN category
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:Arson in Japan]] [[Category:jawiki redirect categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[ar:Category:إحراق الممتلكات في اليابان]] [[ar:Category:تصنيف:إحراق الممتلكات في اليابان]] [[az:Category:Kateqoriya:Yaponiyada qəsdən yandırma]] [[az:Category:Yaponiyada qəsdən yandırma]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[commons:Category:Arsons in Japan]] [[commons:Category:Category:Arsons in Japan]] [[en:Category:Arson in Japan]] [[en:Category:Arson in Japan]] [[fa:Category:آتش‌سوزی‌ها در ژاپن]] [[fa:Category:رده:آتش‌سوزی‌ها در ژاپن]] [[ja:Category:日本の放火事件]] [[ja:Category:日本の放火事件]] [[ko:Category:분류:일본의 방화 사건]] [[ko:Category:일본의 방화 사건]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Incêndios criminosos no Japão]] [[pt:Category:Incêndios criminosos no Japão]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kazahinomi-no-Miya Arson Incident]] [[th:Category:การลอบวางเพลิงในประเทศญี่ปุ่น]] [[th:Category:หมวดหมู่:การลอบวางเพลิงในประเทศญี่ปุ่น]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:جاپان میں آتش زنی]] [[vi:Category:Phóng hỏa ở Nhật Bản]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Phóng hỏa ở Nhật Bản]] [[zh:Category:Category:日本縱火案]] [[zh:Category:日本縱火案]]
==Local Content==
[[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9670778)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9670778)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
